channel.title: LaTeX on ngdnhtien
channel.description: Recent content in LaTeX on ngdnhtien

item.title: The end of a journey is also the start of a new journey
item.description: At around 6 o’clock on a dewy day of November 2020, the phone rang on my way home. I could not reply since I was driving, so almost one hour later did I decide to call back. “Are you Nguyen Dinh Tien?”, said the girl on the other end. “Yes”, I replied. Normally I would expect professionals to declare on behalf of what organization are they speaking, but this time was quite different.

item.title: A nice LaTeX template
item.description: This template looks good. Kinda aggressively prompted me to start writing a book.
